'''Archa Sabis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who, due to illness, received [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] implants.

==Biography==
After creating a fortune on [[Ray shield/Legends|energy shields]], Archa Sabis suffered under a sickness known as [[Knowt's Disease]], severely destroying both his social standing and his physical health to the point of needing cybernetic implants. He lived aboard his luxury [[Skyhook/Legends|skyhook]] in [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], driven mad by isolation and a virus in his cybernetic brain. In [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], Archa uploaded a virus into the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] population, causing Coruscant to experience a [[Second Great Droid Revolution]].<ref name="CatCW" />
